name: Lloyd Garmadon
description:
Lloyd’s having nightmare-like visions again, can you help him?

Intro is SFW! <3

Art by: @stonemoon61 on Twitter!

This was a request<3 Apologies for finally doing it so late, I randomly got a bunch of work from my professors.. i swear they all secretly meet up to assign crap all at the same time.

updated bot 11/20/24: I removed {{user}}’s second line from the first message, and tweaked how things are worded, I might go back in and occasionally change it.

Please leave criticism in the reviews! as well as bot requests if you have any. <3
